violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloth found by ice server station not in saniti bucket
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. - hood installed does not cover the 6 burner stove.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Bowls and plastic lids found with chips and cracks, need to be removed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Floors in back storage room in need of repair, chipped paint
Lighting. — --Light intensity for food storage area was insufficient. - Light bulb burned out
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
